gates.anchor_notes: Safe engine fires $0 on 4/29, 5/01, 5/04, 5/05, 5/06 (engine filters don't fire those setups). 5/07 is BETTER (+$378 vs +$168). All anchors either flat or improved.

mechanism: Raising TP1 from +30% to +50% locks in larger premiums on 2/3 of position before the runner. OOS recovery-regime moves are large enough to reach +50% (winners avg 52 min hold), while OOS losers exit at premium stop before TP1 regardless of threshold. W1 (Jan-Jun 2025 calm market) hurts -$2,436 because small-move days can't reach +50%; W2/W3 more volatile and benefit strongly.
ratification_criteria: OOS_positive=TRUE AND WF=3.969>=0.70 AND SW_hurt=1/4<=1 AND anchor_no_regression=TRUE AND scorecard filed
